parents.subject: LU-12410 lnet: Convert lnetctl peer add and del

commit.subject: LU-12410 lnet: Convert yaml peer configuration
commit.message:
LU-12410 lnet: Convert yaml peer configuration

Convert the yaml peer config handlers to utilize the new capabilities
provided by the nidstrings library.

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/35307
Lustre-commit: e14235f35cb6bbadb7005192fac8524077c8c7bf

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Chris Horn <hornc@cray.com>
Change-Id: I89a53ded636877661a3600822ca49030c8841540
